title: Aluna's Ruby Tools
description: Adds ruby tools and a 3×3-mining hammer for faster progression and powerful underground excavation.
body:
This mod introduces ruby as a new high-tier resource, rarer than diamond but rewarding to find. Ruby ore generates deep underground and drops raw rubies used to craft a full set of ruby tools. These tools outperform diamond but remain slightly below netherite for balance. The mod also adds a custom ruby hammer: a powerful mining tool capable of breaking a 3×3 area of blocks at once, perfect for tunneling, clearing space, and speeding up early progression. With vibrant textures and smooth integration into world generation, ruby becomes a natural addition to your mining adventure.

Ruby Spawn Details:

1 vein per chunk (diamonds have ~1-2)
4 blocks per vein (diamonds have ~4-8)
Y=-64 to Y=32 height range
